chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Muslim Killing a Dhimmi, a Slave, a Mudabbar, or a Mukatab, or Them Killing a Muslim

text: 5266 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَلْعَزِيزِ اَلْعَبْدِيِّ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ شَجَّ عَبْداً مُوضِحَةً قَالَ "عَلَيْهِ نِصْفُ عُشْرِ قِيمَتِهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5266 - Imam Abu Abdullah (as) was asked about a man who inflicted a mudhiha (a wound exposing the bone) on a slave.
Imam (as) said: "He is liable to pay half of one-tenth of the slave's value."
